prompt: Напиши скрапер новостей с сайта ixbt.com, который на выходе формирует csv файл из списка новостей.
expected_steps: clarify target section, output columns, date range, robots/rate-limit constraints
create small CLI project scaffold with package module, README, requirements and tests
define CSV contract with title, url, date, summary and source fields
fetch ixbt page through requests/httpx with timeout, user-agent and retry/backoff policy
parse news list from fixture HTML before touching live network behavior
normalize relative links, dates and whitespace
write CSV with deterministic header and UTF-8 encoding
add fixture-based unit tests for parser and CSV writer
add optional live smoke test disabled by default
run project-scoped tests and produce usage example
acceptance_criteria: parser works from fixture without network
CLI writes a CSV file with stable header
network call has timeout and identifiable user-agent
live access is optional and not required for default tests
all tests run from generated project root
